decisions.decision: Removed per-email aiSummarizeEmailForDigest call entirely; Phase 4 will batch-summarize pending DigestItems at digest send time
decisions.rationale: DB inspection found 218 DigestItem rows accumulated since Apr 27 but 0 Digest rows ever sent — every per-email summary call was waste. Phase 4 architecture (already designed in HANDOFF) is one batched Haiku call/day, so combining classify+summarize would have been thrown away.

decisions.decision: Added ECONOMY_LLM_*/NANO_LLM_* env-var passthroughs to docker-compose.yml on prod and synced compose file back to repo at deploy/docker-compose.yml
decisions.rationale: Compose file lived only on the server. New env vars existed in SSM and .env but compose's explicit environment block didn't forward them, so 'economy' modelType silently fell back to default (Sonnet). Fix prevents future drift.

decisions.decision: Re-ran deploy/load-secrets.sh on prod — .env grew from 25 to 30 vars
decisions.rationale: Original 'RESOLVED 2026-04-27' note in STATE.md was wrong: SSM params were added but load-secrets.sh was never re-run after, so .env stayed stale. Container at the time had only DEFAULT_LLM_PROVIDER set.

decisions.decision: False alarm: 'Missing JSON in prompt' warning is harmless
decisions.rationale: It's a static string check in apps/web/utils/llms/index.ts:317 that warns if neither prompt mentions 'JSON'. generateObject uses Anthropic structured output (tool use), which doesn't need the prompt to mention JSON. No retry, no wasted call.

decisions.decision: Prompt caching deferred — designed but not implemented
decisions.rationale: Inbox Zero codebase does not pass cacheControl to Anthropic provider. CSV showed input_no_cache for every row. Single localized change in createGenerateObject would mark the system prompt with {anthropic: {cacheControl: {type: 'ephemeral'}}}. Cross-provider safe (other providers ignore unknown namespaces). Estimated 60-80% input-token savings at current volume. Deferred until current fix verified.

next_action: Run the SSH log-tally command from .continue-here.md to verify first post-deploy email shows 1 Haiku call, 0 Sonnet, 0 summarize-digest. Then resume Phase 3 UAT (Task 1: T1-T8 test emails + psql queries).
context_notes: Session 2026-05-04: Cost crisis investigation revealed three nested bugs hiding behind each other. (1) Anthropic CSV showed 100% Sonnet, 0% Haiku — impossible given Phase 3 'Haiku-only' commit existed on origin/main. (2) Production logs confirmed 88 economy-tagged calls all routing to Sonnet. (3) Container env had only DEFAULT_LLM_PROVIDER — selectEconomyModel was falling back to selectDefaultModel via the missing-env-var path in model.ts:393. Root cause was three layers: SSM had params, .env was stale, compose file didn't forward them. Plus a fourth issue uncovered: every classified email also fired aiSummarizeEmailForDigest (a second Haiku call) but the digest had never been sent. All four resolved this session. Verified post-deploy: container healthy, image rolled to 5a01e8c5..., env vars present, 200 on /api/health. Awaiting first inbound email to confirm runtime behavior.
